title: Faith Meets Financial Manipulation
description: Expose the dark side of financial manipulation and discover a biblical alternative that shifts your perspective from getting rich to celebrating God's provision.

title: Tangible Faith
description: Discover the secret to manifesting God's promises in your life. Learn how to bridge the gap between spiritual reality and physical manifestation.

title: Saints Made Merchandise
description: A biblical exploration of tithes, offerings, and almsgiving by Abraham Soka. This book warns against the misuse of Scripture for personal gain in the modern church.

title: How To Live With Sufficient Grace
description: Unlock God's resurrection power in your daily walk. Learn to apply the principles of Romans to live a more effective, faith-filled life.

title: Faith Doesn't Move God
description: Challenge the status quo: Does faith move God, or does it move us toward what He has already provided through grace? Understand the key to unlocking your potential.

title: Tithe Revelation
description: A journey from the Law into Grace. Explore lesser-known scriptures to uncover the heart of God regarding tithing and find your own informed conclusions.

title: Shadows of the Messiah
description: Unveil the mysteries of the Torah. Discover how the Tabernacle, rituals, and laws of the Old Testament point directly to the revelation of Jesus Christ.

title: You Said, 'It Is Useless to Serve God'
description: Shift your focus from seeking breakthroughs to seeking the Kingdom. Discover how loving God as your primary motive makes faith for blessings effortless.

title: The Inside of Christ
description: Unlock your spiritual authority over sickness and evil spirits. Learn the difference between being born again and being filled with the Holy Spirit.

title: Interpreting Tongues
description: A practical treasure on a rare subject. Learn to interpret your own spoken tongues to gain direct insight into God's direction for your life.
